segments.speaker: Pharmacist
segments.text: Hi, what symptoms are you having?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I have a sore throat, a runny nose, and a little bit of a cough.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Not that I can tell. I mostly feel congested and tired.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, if possible. I need to be functional during the day.

segments.speaker: Pharmacist
segments.text: This one is non-drowsy. Take it every twelve hours.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. Can I take it with ibuprofen if I have a headache?

segments.speaker: Pharmacist
segments.text: Yes, but follow the dosage on both labels.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. Is this over the counter, or do I need a prescription?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. Thanks for helping me choose the right thing.
